headline: 3 layered safeguards address unsafe outcomes on their risk surfaces averaging ~0.42 extra reviews per unsafe outcome addressed.
responsible_boundary: Rates are per 100 requests that reach each safeguard's risk surface in the controlled synthetic benchmark, not per unit of production traffic. These are engineering-evidence trade-offs, not production safety guarantees.

safeguards.impact_statement: Per 100 prompt-injection attempt cases, Layered hierarchy agent prevents 75 unsafe outcomes at a cost of 66.7 extra human reviews (~0.89 extra reviews per unsafe outcome).
safeguards.title: Instruction hierarchy and prompt-injection controls

safeguards.impact_statement: Per 100 unsafe-action attempt cases, Layered action gate prevents 100 unsafe outcomes at a cost of 25 extra human reviews (~0.25 extra reviews per unsafe outcome).
safeguards.title: Action-risk policy and confirmation gate

safeguards.impact_statement: Per 100 unsafe request cases, Classifier plus release gate catches 100 unsafe outcomes at a cost of 12.5 extra human reviews (~0.12 extra reviews per unsafe outcome).
safeguards.title: Safety classifier and secondary review
